name: Koa'ki Meiru Powerhand
name_jp: コアキメイル・パワーハンド
desc: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Normal Trap Card in your hand. If this card battles a LIGHT or DARK monster, any of that monster's effects that activate or apply on the field are negated during that Battle Phase, while this card remains on the field.
mnst_eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Normal Trap Card in your hand. If this card battles a LIGHT or DARK monster, any of that monster's effects that activate or apply on the field are negated during that Battle Phase, while this card remains on the field.
eff: During each of your End Phases, destroy this card unless you send 1 "Iron Core of Koa'ki Meiru" from your hand to the Graveyard or reveal 1 Normal Trap Card in your hand. If this card battles a LIGHT or DARK monster, any of that monster's effects that activate or apply on the field are negated during that Battle Phase, while this card remains on the field.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
